Part.Source:
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'N' &DataHora = servernow() &outsdtCadastroPDV.DataUltSync = toformattedString(&DataHora) //RetornaVersaoPDV_Aplicacao.Call(&outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvVer, &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvVerApl)
RetornaVersaoMonitor.call(&EmpVerPdv, &EmpVerPdvNew) &HojeData = yMDtoD(2025,1,1)
do Case CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'CAD'
For Each Order MonValidacao //PDV nao sabe quem é a empresa ainda. Where MonValidacao = &insdtCadastroPDV.CodigoValidacao Where MonSts = Status_Pdv.PENDENTE
&outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'J200' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Sucesso'
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod = EmpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpRaz = EmpRaz &outsdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer
&outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvId = MonCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon = MonRandon
&outsdtCadastroPDV.monIsIMP = iif(MonIsImp = true, 'S', 'N') &outsdtCadastroPDV.monIsNFE = iif(MonIsNfe = true, 'S', 'N') &outsdtCadastroPDV.monIsTEF = iif(MonIsTef = true, 'S', 'N')
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S' &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvMin = &EmpVerPdv //min buildNumber &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNew = &EmpVerPdvNew //New builNumber
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNewDtaLimTmp = DateToTimestamp.Udp(&HojeData) //dataLimite
getVencimento.Call(EmpCod, EmpChv, &JaspiVarchar, &VencimentoData, &EmPCodSec, &QtdDias) &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCodSecDtaTmp = DateToTimestamp.Udp(&VencimentoData)
MonSts = Status_Pdv.INSTALADO Exit When none &outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'E998' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Monitor Já Configurado!' return EndFor
Commit
CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'UPD'
For Each Order EmpCod, MonCod Where MonRandon = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon
&EmpCod = EmpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'J200' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Sucesso'
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod = EmpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpRaz = EmpRaz &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvId = MonCod
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S'
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvMin = &EmpVerPdv //min buildNumber &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNew = &EmpVerPdvNew //New builNumber
&outsdtCadastroPDV.monIsIMP = iif(MonIsImp = true, 'S', 'N') &outsdtCadastroPDV.monIsNFE = iif(MonIsNfe = true, 'S', 'N') &outsdtCadastroPDV.monIsTEF = iif(MonIsTef = true, 'S', 'N')
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpVerPdvNewDtaLimTmp = DateToTimestamp.Udp(&HojeData) //dataLimite
getVencimento.Call(EmpCod, EmpChv, &JaspiVarchar, &VencimentoData, &EmPCodSec, &QtdDias) &outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCodSecDtaTmp = DateToTimestamp.Udp(&VencimentoData)
Exit When none &outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'E998' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Monitor não localizado!' return EndFor
CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'FIN'
For Each Order EmpCod, MonCod Where MonRandon = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod = EmpCod //&outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCod = PdvCod
&outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'J200' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Sucesso'
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S'
MonUltSync = now() MonVer = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvVer
Exit When none &outsdtCadastroPDV.Sts = 'E998' &outsdtCadastroPDV.Msg = 'Monitor não localizado!' return EndFor
Commit EndCase
